title: Odostemon zimapanus
taxonomy: Odostemon zimapanus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. This plant is part of the genus Odostemon, which is closely related to the genus Peperomia. The family Piperaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pepper plants or pepperworts. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other species in the plant kingdom. As part of the larger plant kingdom, Odostemon zimapanus shares characteristics with other flowering plants, including the production of seeds and flowers.
